name: ETTh1
notes: Small public ETT benchmark file suitable for quick local comparison.

name: ETTh2
notes: Small public ETT benchmark file suitable for quick local comparison.

name: ETTm1
notes: Medium-frequency ETT benchmark; larger than hourly files but still practical.

name: ETTm2
notes: Medium-frequency ETT benchmark; larger than hourly files but still practical.

name: Weather
notes: Common LTSF benchmark; source repo documents acquisition but file size/licensing should be checked before vendoring.

name: Electricity
notes: Common LTSF benchmark; typically larger than ETT.

name: Traffic
notes: Large traffic benchmark; not pulled by default.

name: Exchange Rate
notes: Small financial-like benchmark; candidate for a later download if source file URL is pinned.

name: ILI
notes: Epidemiological benchmark; useful for non-finance regime shift comparison.

name: M4
notes: Large competition benchmark; do not vendor until a focused reproduction needs it.

name: Monash Time Series Forecasting Archive
notes: Broad archive used by foundation-model work; should be accessed through official tooling.

name: UCR/UEA Time Series Classification Archive
notes: Classification benchmark relevant to MOMENT but not directly comparable to Lingxi ranking.

name: PEMS
notes: Large spatial-temporal benchmark; not pulled by default.
